title: anthoxanthum aculeatum
intro: Anthoxanthum aculeatum, also known as needle grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum aculeatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of needle grass can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
